title: MARA Announces Bitcoin Production and Mining Operation Updates for October 2024
text: MARA announced October 2024 production updates. The company's energized hash rate reached 40.2 EH/s, a 14% increase over September. BTC production increased by 2% to 717 BTC, and transaction fees accounted for approximately 5% of total production. These metrics demonstrate continued operational momentum and increasing mining efficiency.
